name: Rendon Apex Tracker
visual_description: A lean, weathered human scout in earth-toned leather armor crouches mid-stride through dense wilderness, one hand gripping a wooden spear. Scarred face and alert eyes scan the overgrown path ahead. Tangled vines and gnarled trees frame the figure against a shadowed forest backdrop.
full_prompt: A lean, weathered human scout in earth-toned leather armor crouches mid-stride through dense wilderness, one hand gripping a wooden spear. Scarred face and alert eyes scan the overgrown path ahead. Tangled vines and gnarled trees frame the figure against a shadowed forest backdrop.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
